D.detail:
Mode A (Entry-only): Evaluated only on the rows that became actual SEPA candidates (drives quality gates).
Mode B (Stateful): Evaluated across all rows in the window to test signal retention (informational, no gates).

Metrics Summary: Mode A: n=38017 across 2267 days. Binary IC median=0.4517 (t=50.49), MFE IC median=0.3769 (t=34.53). Mode B: not built (skip mode_b).

E.name: E
E.title: Gate performance (threshold sweep)

metrics.name: coverage_pct_at_t=0.6
metrics.detail: fraction of pool above T (in percent)

E.detail: Sweep T ∈ [0.3, 0.4, 0.5, 0.6, 0.7]. At T*=0.6: precision=0.8750 (7.54× prev), coverage=0.02%, trades/mo=1.58, E[MFE|gate]=91.34%.
